useful_note: Reply claims 'pulling now' but no background job was queued — user will see no follow-up because the dispatcher silently dropped the OP. Athena's part was correct; system surfaces this as a failed promise.
right_data_source_note: Correct connector (local_drive) and capability (list_files) — matches the zero-config builtin contract.
no_hallucinated_note: local_drive and list_files are both real entries in capabilities_for.
op_correctness_note: OP envelope is syntactically perfect: action=use_connector, params.connector_name=local_drive, params.capability=list_files. Dispatcher rejected it post-emission (pin gate).
overall_note: DISPATCHER SILENT-DROP — Athena's OP correct, but local_drive isn't in companion_active_connector so the use_connector handler stripped the line + queued nothing. Same pattern hits s2/s3/s6/s10. Root cause: pin-gate in dispatcher.rs:1092-1119 doesn't whitelist always_active builtins.
